products_list.name: 21k Gold Heritage Necklace - Lady Fortuna
products_list.description:
Discover the timeless elegance of our 21k yellow gold long necklaces, designed to make a majestic statement. Crafted from high-purity 21k gold for a rich, warm, and radiant luster, each necklace showcases exquisite artisan details and traditional craftsmanship. Featuring a graceful long drape, these statement pieces are perfect for layering, formal celebrations, or wearing standalone as a symbol of luxury and heritage. A magnificent addition to your bridal jewelry or a precious heirloom to pass down through generations.

Material: 21k Solid Yellow Gold
Length: Long, elegant drape styling
Craftsmanship: High-polish finish with traditional hand-detailed engraving
Occasion: Ideal for weddings, formal cultural celebrations, or special gifts
